title: SunPump Agent Token Launch API
subtitle: Paid agent token creation through SunPump
description:
## What it does

SunPump Agent Token Launch API lets agents, scripts, and applications pay with x402 and submit token launch metadata to SunPump. The gateway forwards the caller's JSON payload to the SunPump launch endpoint after payment settlement.

## Best for

- Agent workflows that need to create a meme or agent token from structured metadata.
- Operator tools that want one paid API call for token creation.
- Testnet and mainnet payment flows across TRON and BSC while using the same SunPump launch request shape.

## Request shape

POST a JSON body with `name`, `symbol`, `description`, `imageBase64`, `twitterUrl`, `telegramUrl`, `websiteUrl`, and `tweetUsername`. Keep `name` within 1-20 characters and use a unique symbol. `imageBase64` may include a base64-encoded token image; if it is empty or omitted, SunPump generates an image automatically.

## Code usage

Use `x402-cli pay` against the route for the payment chain you want. For TRON Nile testnet:

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/sunpump-token-launch-tron-nile/pump-api/ai/agentTokenLaunch' \
  --method POST \
  --network tron:nile \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree \
  --max-amount 0.001 \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --body '{"name":"X402NileA","symbol":"X4A17","description":"x402 launch test","imageBase64":"","twitterUrl":"","telegramUrl":"","websiteUrl":"","tweetUsername":""}'
```

Other routes use the same JSON body: TRON Mainnet uses `sunpump-token-launch-tron` with `tron:mainnet`; BSC Testnet uses `sunpump-token-launch-bsc-testnet` with `eip155:97`; BSC Mainnet uses `sunpump-token-launch-bsc` with `eip155:56`.
useCase: Use this provider when an app, agent, or CLI workflow needs to launch a SunPump token after a successful x402 payment. Choose the route matching the intended payment chain: TRON Nile, TRON Mainnet, BSC Testnet, or BSC Mainnet.

## шГ╜хБЪф╗Аф╣И

SunPump Agent хПСх╕Б API хЕБшо╕ AgentуАБшДЪцЬмхТМх║ФчФихЕИхоМцИР x402 цФпф╗Шя╝МхЖНцККхПСх╕БхЕГцХ░цНоцПРф║дч╗Щ SunPumpуАВGateway хЬицФпф╗Шч╗УчоЧхРОцККш░ГчФицЦ╣чЪД JSON шп╖ц▒Вф╜Уш╜мхПСхИ░ SunPump хПСх╕БцОехПгуАВ

## щАВхРИхЬ║цЩп

- щЬАшжБхЯ║ф║Оч╗УцЮДхМЦхЕГцХ░цНохИЫх╗║ meme token цИЦ agent token чЪД Agent х╖еф╜Ьц╡БуАВ
- х╕МцЬЫчФиф╕Ацмбф╗Шш┤╣ API ш░ГчФихоМцИРхПСх╕БчЪДш┐РшРех╖ехЕ╖уАВ
- хЬи TRON хТМ BSC чЪДц╡ЛшпХч╜СуАБф╕╗ч╜Сф╕Кф╜┐чФихРМф╕АхеЧ SunPump хПСх╕Бшп╖ц▒Вца╝х╝ПщкМшпБцФпф╗Шц╡БчиЛуАВ

## шп╖ц▒Вца╝х╝П

POST JSON шп╖ц▒Вф╜УхМЕхРл `name`уАБ`symbol`уАБ`description`уАБ`imageBase64`уАБ`twitterUrl`уАБ`telegramUrl`уАБ`websiteUrl` хТМ `tweetUsername`уАВ`name` щЬАшжБф┐ЭцМБхЬи 1-20 ф╕кхнЧчмжхЖЕя╝Мх╣╢ф╜┐чФихФпф╕А symbolуАВ`imageBase64` хПпф╗еф╝ахЕе base64 ч╝ЦчаБчЪД token хЫ╛чЙЗя╝ЫхжВцЮЬф╕║чй║цИЦф╕Нф╝ая╝МSunPump ф╝ЪшЗкхКичФЯцИРхЫ╛чЙЗуАВ

## ф╗гчаБчФиц│Х

ф╜┐чФи `x402-cli pay` ш░ГчФичЫоцаЗцФпф╗ШщУ╛хп╣х║ФчЪДш╖пчФ▒уАВTRON Nile ц╡ЛшпХч╜Счд║ф╛Ля╝Ъ

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/sunpump-token-launch-tron-nile/pump-api/ai/agentTokenLaunch' \
  --method POST \
  --network tron:nile \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree \
  --max-amount 0.001 \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --body '{"name":"X402NileA","symbol":"X4A17","description":"x402 launch test","imageBase64":"","twitterUrl":"","telegramUrl":"","websiteUrl":"","tweetUsername":""}'
```

хЕ╢ф╗Цш╖пчФ▒ф╜┐чФихРМф╕АхеЧ JSON шп╖ц▒Вф╜Уя╝ЪTRON ф╕╗ч╜Сф╜┐чФи `sunpump-token-launch-tron` хТМ `tron:mainnet`я╝ЫBSC ц╡ЛшпХч╜Сф╜┐чФи `sunpump-token-launch-bsc-testnet` хТМ `eip155:97`я╝ЫBSC ф╕╗ч╜Сф╜┐чФи `sunpump-token-launch-bsc` хТМ `eip155:56`уАВ

endpoints.title: Launch Agent Token
endpoints.subtitle: Create a SunPump token from metadata
endpoints.description: Submit token metadata to SunPump after x402 payment settlement. `imageBase64` can carry a base64-encoded token image; when it is empty or omitted, SunPump generates an image automatically. The response includes SunPump status and token data such as token id, owner address, contract address, logo URL, create transaction hash, reserves, and market data when available.
endpoints.useCase: Use this endpoint when an agent or backend has already validated launch metadata and is ready to create the token.
